creator: groot@kde.org
text:
Created attachment 170016
Patch updates CURDIR

This comes from area51, the KDE-FreeBSD staging area. Original work by rakuco and tcberner. This patch replaces a bunch of ${CURDIR}/../../ by ${CURDIR:H:H}; the latter is considered proper contemporary usage by kde@ . The patch is independent of other KDE4 infrastructure changes.

Patch applies to ports r414649. Use -p4 because it's polluted with paths from my own system.
